metadata.name: Grafana Alloy
metadata.description: OpenTelemetry collector by Grafana that collects, processes, and exports metrics and logs to various backends like Prometheus and Loki.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
OpenTelemetry collector by Grafana that collects, processes, and exports metrics and logs to various backends like Prometheus and Loki.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` as a file.

1. Decide on service names, ports, volumes, credentials, and optional integrations before rendering the stack.
2. Fill in the required variables first, then enable optional sections such as Traefik, metrics, or extra services only when needed.
3. Render the Compose project, review the generated files, and start it with Docker Compose in the target directory.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `service_name`: Name of the service; optional; default: alloy.
- `container_hostname`: Container internal hostname; optional.
- `restart_policy`: Policy used for Container Restart; required; default: unless-stopped; options: unless-stopped, always, on-failure, no.

### Log Collection
- `logs_docker`: Enable Docker container log collection; optional; default: true.
- `logs_enabled`: Enable log collection; optional; default: false.
- `logs_loki_url`: Loki endpoint URL for sending logs; required; default: http://loki:3100/loki/api/v1/push.
- `logs_system`: Enable system and journalctl log collection; optional; default: true.

### Metrics Collection
- `metrics_docker`: Enable Docker container metrics collection (cAdvisor); optional; default: true.
- `metrics_enabled`: Enable metrics collection; optional; default: false.
- `metrics_prometheus_url`: Prometheus remote write endpoint; required; default: http://prometheus:9090/api/v1/write.
- `metrics_system`: Enable system (node) metrics collection; optional; default: true.

### Ports
- `ports_webui`: Port for Alloy web UI; optional; default: 12345.

### Traefik
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik reverse proxy integration; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_host`: Hostname used for Traefik; optional.
- `traefik_domain`: Base domain (e.g., home.arpa); required.
- `traefik_network`: Name to use for the traefik network; required; default: traefik.
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable HTTPS/TLS; optional; default: true.
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: Traefik certificate resolver name; required; default: cloudflare; shown when: traefik_tls_enabled=true.

## References
- [Grafana Alloy](https://grafana.com/oss/alloy/)
- [Documentation](https://grafana.com/docs/alloy/latest/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/grafana/alloy)
## Notes
### Variables
- `container_hostname` - Set this to a unique value to identify the instance in your monitoring backend. Otherwise it defaults to the container ID.
